meta.settlementRailsDoc: Per-token `settlementRail` in each row is copied into sonic-chain-pack. Keep in sync with Aegis-contracts/config/bridge-tokens.json.
meta.note: Keep in sync with Aegis-contracts/config/bridge-tokens.json and frontend-token-distribution/src/config/bridge-tokens.json.
meta.requiredAfterDeploy: CRITICAL: Every AGS row uses tokenAddress 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 as a placeholder. After you deploy PrivateTokenContract, you MUST paste its address into Aegis-contracts/config/bridge-tokens.json, frontend/src/config/bridge-tokens.json, and frontend-token-distribution/src/config/bridge-tokens.json (all AGS rows for sonic and sonicTestnet), then run: node Aegis-contracts/scripts/generate-frontend-env.js and rebuild/copy sonic-chain-pack. Until you do, the privacy bridge and AGS conversion will not work.

dutchAuctionDisplay.scope: Pre-sale Dutch auction only: `referenceUsdPerUnit` and related UI copy apply **only** during the TGE auction window. After the sale ends they have **no** intended use for AGS valuation, routing, oracles, or treasury math — post-sale pricing is **market-driven** (pools, DEX, external feeds). On-chain optional ERC-20 pay-in uses separate fixed pegs in `AutomatedDutchAuction` (see docs/tokendistribution/DUTCH_AUCTION_S_PRICING.md).
dutchAuctionDisplay.note: Pre-sale / Dutch auction messaging only. Not an on-chain oracle and **not** for use after the auction ends.
